titles.title: I Choose to Be a Christian

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was taught the scriptures before I could read them, I found them to be true, that's why I believe them With all of my heart, my soul and my strength, With every song I sing.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I choose to be a Christian, I will follow Christ, Carry the cross that leads to light, I will be true, stand for my convictions, Whatever others do, I choose to be a Christian.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As this world grows darker, my lamp will be burning, Kindled with love for the one who is worthy, He gave his all, so I will give mine, I'll lay my life on the line.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will be bold, Unashamed of the gospel of his name.
